items.q: Which tv show features the character Wednesday Addams?
items.explanation: Wednesday Addams is associated with Wednesday.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the tv show The Walking Dead?
items.explanation: Rick Grimes is one of the defining characters in The Walking Dead.

items.q: Name the tv show that features the character Sherlock Holmes.
items.explanation: Sherlock Holmes is strongly linked to Sherlock.

items.q: The character Jack Shephard appears in Lost.
items.explanation: Jack Shephard is a key character in Lost.

items.q: Name the tv show that features the character Meredith Grey.
items.explanation: Meredith Grey is strongly linked to Greys Anatomy.

items.q: Name the tv show that features the character Eleven.
items.explanation: Eleven is strongly linked to Stranger Things.

items.q: Name the tv show that features the character Homer Simpson.
items.explanation: Homer Simpson is strongly linked to The Simpsons.

items.q: The character Joel Miller appears in The Boys.
items.explanation: Joel Miller appears in The Last of Us, not The Boys.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the tv show Game of Thrones?
items.explanation: Jon Snow is one of the defining characters in Game of Thrones.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the tv show Brooklyn Nine-Nine?
items.explanation: Jake Peralta is one of the defining characters in Brooklyn Nine-Nine.
